purpose: record the shortest daily operator path and single-page bottleneck focus for the current repository state
single_most_important_issue: supervision target quality and selective ambiguity handling for next-step branch allocation, especially on hard ambiguous pairs
current_strongest_scaffold: pairwise default plus tie-aware post-hoc deferral plus specialist pointwise fallback
current_most_promising_next_direction: budget-conditioned branch-level value or penalized marginal continuation value with explicit uncertainty and derived compare/defer decisions
